# Empath

> Empath is "the journal you won't quit" — an AI journaling and memory app that lives where you already are. Call a number, send a text, drop a voice note on WhatsApp or Telegram, or use the iOS app. Empath transcribes, tracks mood, surfaces patterns, and builds a searchable memory of your inner life over time. Empath is operated by Reality Articulated Inc.

The core insight: most journaling apps fail because they require opening another app. Empath removes that friction by working over the channels you already use — phone calls, SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram, and iOS. Entries are transcribed, analyzed for sentiment and themes, and stitched into a growing personal memory you can query and reflect on. Empath also offers an optional therapist platform that lets clinicians see between-session patterns from clients who choose to share, but the journaling app stands on its own.

## Empath the journaling app

- [Empath app](https://www.empathdash.com/) and [/app](https://www.empathdash.com/app): The product home. Features include phone-call journaling, SMS/WhatsApp/Telegram journaling, AI voice transcription, chat-to-journal (an AI assistant that interviews you and turns the conversation into an entry), journaling plans (cadence commitments with forgiving streaks and adaptive reminders), mood tracking, pattern detection, and AI-generated insights.
- [Why Empath?](https://www.empathdash.com/whyempath): Why people stick with Empath when other journals fail — friction-free capture, ambient input channels, durable memory.
- [Journaling Blog](https://www.empathdash.com/app/blog): Guides on journaling habits, app reviews, and mental wellness practices.

### What makes Empath different

- **Call to journal**: Dial a number and talk. Empath transcribes and stores the entry.
- **Message anywhere**: Journal via SMS, WhatsApp, or Telegram — no app switching.
- **Chat to journal**: When you don't know where to start, an AI companion interviews you one question at a time, then composes the conversation into a journal entry in your own voice. Distinct from chatting with your existing journals.
- **Journaling plans**: Set a daily or weekly cadence with forgiving streaks (grace days), track progress, and get adaptive reminders by push, SMS, or email that skip themselves on days you've already journaled.
- **Memories**: Entries accumulate into a searchable, queryable memory of your patterns, themes, and history.
- **Insights**: AI surfaces mood trends, recurring topics, and reflections over time.
- **Privacy**: End-to-end encryption, HIPAA-compliant, never used to train third-party AI models.
- **Free**: Core journaling, transcription, mood tracking, and insights are free.

## Empath for therapists (additional offering)

Empath also offers an optional platform for therapists whose clients use Empath, giving clinicians a between-session view of how clients are doing. This is a separate product available to credentialed therapists; it does not affect how individual journaling users experience the app.

- [Empath for Therapists](https://www.empathdash.com/therapist): Therapist product overview.
- [The Science](https://www.empathdash.com/science): Research underpinning the therapist offering — therapeutic alliance, sudden gains, homework effects.
- [Clinical Advisory Board](https://www.empathdash.com/advisory): For therapists who want to shape the product.
- [Therapist Blog](https://www.empathdash.com/blog): Evidence-based articles for clinicians.

## Policies and transparency

- [AI Transparency](https://www.empathdash.com/transparency): AI models used, what data they see, BAAs.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.empathdash.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://www.empathdash.com/terms)
- [Our Pledge](https://www.empathdash.com/pledge): Ethical commitments on privacy and responsible AI.
